//: gate.cat dogfooding hook — paste into your project's .claude/settings.json (merge the hooks block).
//path: Fix the absolute path to veto_hook.py for your machine. After `pip install gate.cat` the hook lives in the package's examples, or copy it anywhere and point at it.
//log: Every decision (allow AND block) appends to ~/.cacheback/veto_log.jsonl — that log feeds false_block_rate.py.
